Video.summary: Erica kicked her boyfriend Martez out of their house and out of her life. But she’s willing to give him a second chance if he proves that he didn’t molest her 4 year old son! Then, Christy’s ex Stephen refuses to admit that he fathered her son!
Video.title: Single Mothers Get Results

Image.alt: Single Mothers Get Results
Single Mothers Get Results
Single Mothers Get Results

Video.summary: Robert says he believes that his daughters mother has been abusing her and he wants to prove the abuse and gain full custody of his daughter. Then, Casey claims her ex-boyfriend is abusive towards their kids and she wants him out of their lives.
Video.title: I Have Proof, You're Abusing Our Child

Image.alt: I Have Proof, You're Abusing Our Child
I Have Proof, You're Abusing Our Child
I Have Proof, You're Abusing Our Child

Video.summary: Connie wants Steve’s help to stop her daughter Angel from marrying Matt. She claims Matt gave her Angel a black eye, broken nose, concussion, and 3 knocked out teeth. Can Connie reason with Angel and convince her to leave this abusive relationship?
Video.title: He Put Me in the Hospital But I'm Still Marrying Him

Image.alt: He Put Me in the Hospital But I'm Still Marrying Him
He Put Me in the Hospital But I'm Still Marrying Him
He Put Me in the Hospital But I'm Still Marrying Him

Video.summary: Brandon spent time in jail after being accused of sexually abusing his niece. He maintains his innocence and claims that this isn’t the first time his niece has accused someone of molestation! Was she coached by his sister’s boyfriend Billy?
Video.title: Our Brother Should Be In Jail

Image.alt: Our Brother Should Be In Jail
Our Brother Should Be In Jail
Our Brother Should Be In Jail

Video.summary: While Terrell's wife admits to chatting with other men online, she insists she never slept with any of them; Howard caught his girlfriend lying and wonders if she has been faithful; Devin constantly accuses his new wife of cheating.
Video.title: I Cheated In Front of My Wife...She Didn't Stop Me

Image.alt: I Cheated In Front of My Wife...She Didn't Stop Me
I Cheated In Front of My Wife...She Didn't Stop Me
I Cheated In Front of My Wife...She Didn't Stop Me

Video.summary: Noah and Kendra had a yearlong fling, but when he finally visited her, she had a baby and claimed he was the father! Marvin and Rainy have been married for almost 6 years, but two weeks ago, she received a call saying that Marvin had cheated on her!
Video.title: You're Not the Father, I Borrowed a Baby

Image.alt: You're Not the Father, I Borrowed a Baby
You're Not the Father, I Borrowed a Baby
You're Not the Father, I Borrowed a Baby

Video.summary: Trina's fiance says he heard a voicemail that sounded like her having sex with another man; Amy has put up with her boyfriend's constant accusations of cheating for four years.
Video.title: Steve's Cheat Detector Kit?

Image.alt: Steve's Cheat Detector Kit?
Steve's Cheat Detector Kit?
Steve's Cheat Detector Kit?

Video.summary: Teen Brittany's family is desperate to get her on the road to recovery from heroin addiction; Deyanna says her drug-addicted mother stole a large sum of money from her.
Video.title: Lives Destroyed By Heroin

Image.alt: Lives Destroyed By Heroin
Lives Destroyed By Heroin
Lives Destroyed By Heroin

Video.summary: Robert believes his daughter is being abused and molested by her stepfather, John, but John and Tiffany denies any abuse. Is Tiffany covering for John’s abuse? See the shocking lie detector test today!
Video.title: A Father's Fight for His Daughter

Image.alt: A Father's Fight for His Daughter
A Father's Fight for His Daughter
A Father's Fight for His Daughter

Video.summary: Eric and Lisa are divorced and Eric is now dating Keri. Both Eric and Keri feel like Lisa is stalking them by sending him text messages and naked pictures. Then, Christopher has been unable to trust Olivia and thinks she may be cheating again.
Video.title: She's Stalking Us!

Image.alt: She's Stalking Us!
She's Stalking Us!
She's Stalking Us!

Video.summary: Adrianna says her ex-fiancé is verbally and physically abusive, but he says he had every right to treat her that way to put her in her place.
Video.title: She Deserves It

Image.alt: She Deserves It
She Deserves It
She Deserves It

Video.summary: Eva claims Latosha's boyfriend, Tyrone, had sex with Latosha's daughter; Cynthia believes that Jacob cheated on her with numerous women.
Video.title: Did You Have Sex With My Niece and My Daughter?

Image.alt: Did You Have Sex With My Niece and My Daughter?
Did You Have Sex With My Niece and My Daughter?
Did You Have Sex With My Niece and My Daughter?

Video.summary: Dakia accuses her sister of stealing $12,000 worth of jewelry from her home; Dante believes his brother-in-law stole $2,000 from a friend.
Video.title: Did You Steal From Your Own Family?

Image.alt: Did You Steal From Your Own Family?
Did You Steal From Your Own Family?
Did You Steal From Your Own Family?

Video.summary: A man takes a lie-detector test after being accused of hurting his girlfriend's child.
Video.title: You Failed Five Times?

Image.alt: You Failed Five Times?
You Failed Five Times?
You Failed Five Times?

Video.summary: Scott and Dawn want their sister Betty to leave her abusive boyfriend Michael of 11 months. Michael says Betty abuses him, too, but Scott and Dawn don’t believe him. The drama will explode when Scott confronts Michael on our stage today!
Video.title: Do Not Touch Her on My Stage

Image.alt: Do Not Touch Her on My Stage
Do Not Touch Her on My Stage
Do Not Touch Her on My Stage

Video.summary: Paternity test results could keep Cortez and Mallory's family together or tear them asunder.
Video.title: Confession Leads to Stunning Reactions

Image.alt: Confession Leads to Stunning Reactions
Confession Leads to Stunning Reactions
Confession Leads to Stunning Reactions

Video.summary: Sherry was raped at 15 and ran away from home. She’s asked for Steve’s help to reunite her with her mother. Then, Dawn's teenage daughter Cathy recently gave birth, but lives in fear of the baby’s unemployed and abusive father Nick.
Video.title: Steve Rescues a Runaway / Steve Helps a Teenage Mother

Image.alt: Steve Rescues a Runaway / Steve Helps a Teenage Mother
Steve Rescues a Runaway / Steve Helps a Teenage Mother
Steve Rescues a Runaway / Steve Helps a Teenage Mother

Video.summary: Valarie is here to get custody of her children because she says their father Roy has been abusing them. Roy says that it's her boyfriend who is the abuser. Then, Jennifer is here to because she want's her sister Amber to leave her boyfriend Ceasarae.
Video.title: I've Seen Him Hit Her

Image.alt: I've Seen Him Hit Her
I've Seen Him Hit Her
I've Seen Him Hit Her

Video.summary: Grace wants to expose ex-boyfriend Kenny for destroying her teen years and denying their child. Then, Kendra suspects boyfriend Brandon is cheating on her with his ex Monique, and she thinks he has the STD to prove it!
Video.title: You're Certain He's The Father?/Why Didn't You Tell Me?

Image.alt: You're Certain He's The Father?/Why Didn't You Tell Me?
You're Certain He's The Father?/Why Didn't You Tell Me?
You're Certain He's The Father?/Why Didn't You Tell Me?

Video.summary: Police informed Latoya that her husband was accused of molesting her daughter. She immediately kicked him out, but feels torn. Then, Jesenia suspects her ex Melvin molested their daughter, but Melvin maintains his innocence!
Video.title: If He Fails, This Stage Won't Be Enough

Image.alt: If He Fails, This Stage Won't Be Enough
If He Fails, This Stage Won't Be Enough
If He Fails, This Stage Won't Be Enough

Video.summary: Elaina and her husband Lennard claim their daughter was raped by her brother-in-law Lenel. Lenel’s fiancée and Elaina’s sister, Elissa, believes they’re making up this entire story. Don’t miss the shocking results today!
Video.title: Justice Will Be Served Today

Image.alt: Justice Will Be Served Today
Justice Will Be Served Today
Justice Will Be Served Today

Video.summary: Angelica says John "checks her" for signs of cheating every time she comes home. She wants a lie detector test to prove she's been faithful! Then, Ashley she found out that her boyfriend, TJ, had cheated on her when she was 8 months pregnant.
Video.title: Porn, Confessions, and Revenge Sex

Image.alt: Porn, Confessions, and Revenge Sex
Porn, Confessions, and Revenge Sex
Porn, Confessions, and Revenge Sex

Video.summary: Before Tonesha marries Theotis, she wants to know if he has cheated on her; Danielle suspects her partner, Shaun, is cheating and lying about being at work; less than a day after their wedding, Shante discovered that David sent naked photos to women.
Video.title: I Know He's Cheating, but He Destroyed the Evidence

Image.alt: I Know He's Cheating, but He Destroyed the Evidence
I Know He's Cheating, but He Destroyed the Evidence
I Know He's Cheating, but He Destroyed the Evidence

Video.summary: Chamira left her family for prostitution, but then she sent her sister Latoya a pornographic video featuring minors. Emily received calls claiming that her fiancé Kevin was cheating on her and selling drugs. What will the lie detector tests say?
Video.title: Drugs and Sex Destroyed Our Family

Image.alt: Drugs and Sex Destroyed Our Family
Drugs and Sex Destroyed Our Family
Drugs and Sex Destroyed Our Family

Video.summary: Telisha and teen son Curtis return to the show because she wants him tested for paternity of a young woman's baby.
Video.title: DNA: I Need To Tell Her I'm Gay

Image.alt: DNA: I Need To Tell Her I'm Gay
DNA: I Need To Tell Her I'm Gay
DNA: I Need To Tell Her I'm Gay

Video.summary: Shrina suspects Kurion of cheating and he intends to prove her wrong; Robert believes his wife is leading a double life and has been deceitful.
Video.title: You Expect Me To Believe That?

Image.alt: You Expect Me To Believe That?
You Expect Me To Believe That?
You Expect Me To Believe That?

Video.summary: Adrian thinks Shantay has been lying throughout their relationship; Uniqua and her husband fear that he is not the father of her child; Chris' girlfriend wants him to know that one of their five children is not his.
Video.title: I'll Prove It's Your Child Once and for All

Image.alt: I'll Prove It's Your Child Once and for All
I'll Prove It's Your Child Once and for All
I'll Prove It's Your Child Once and for All

Video.summary: Jessica can't make sense of her on again off again relationship with Wade and it's starting to drive her crazy. Wade however claims he's had nothing to do with Jessica and she's been spreading lies and stalking him for years.
Video.title: I Am Not A Stalker

Image.alt: I Am Not A Stalker
I Am Not A Stalker
I Am Not A Stalker

Video.summary: James learned that his new wife may have been cheating with his cousin; Marissa left her doubting boyfriend two days after her baby was born, and now he wants the truth; Lyric wants to prove to Jeff's family that her baby is his.
Video.title: Steve, I Hope I'm the Father

Image.alt: Steve, I Hope I'm the Father
Steve, I Hope I'm the Father
Steve, I Hope I'm the Father

Video.summary: A couple's children are taken away after the six-month-old nearly dies from having a baby wipe lodged in her windpipe; Shawn says his daughter came home with severe bruising on her body after staying with her mother and told him her mother beat her.
Video.title: Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him

Image.alt: Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him
Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him
Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him

Video.summary: Risha is accused of being involved in her best friend's murder; an update on Tabatha, who revealed on the show that her boyfriend allowed her to prostitute so they could get high together.
Video.title: Murder Accusations Cause Chaos

Image.alt: Murder Accusations Cause Chaos
Murder Accusations Cause Chaos
Murder Accusations Cause Chaos

Video.summary: A woman whose fiancé tried to strangle her still believes he is a good guy; a teen who has lived a life of crime finds her younger sister following in her footsteps and wants to stop her.
Video.title: Don't Waste My Time / A Sister's Bad Influence

Image.alt: Don't Waste My Time / A Sister's Bad Influence
Don't Waste My Time / A Sister's Bad Influence
Don't Waste My Time / A Sister's Bad Influence
